title: Friday Reflection: The EQ Gap
excerpt: Why your AI adoption strategy is failing at the human layer — and what to do about it.

title: What AI Can't Fix (Because You Broke It First)
excerpt: Trust deficits predate AI — AI just reveals them. You can't borrow against trust you haven't built.

title: AI Doesn't Create Your Culture. It Reveals It.
excerpt: AI is a Rorschach test for organizational culture. Governance reflects trust — it doesn't create it.
